caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt with suspenders, a red bowtie, glasses, and headphones. He wears a grey, stylized wig that peaks upward. He is positioned behind a black microphone. The background consists of a wall featuring framed photographs and clothing items on hangers, including a visible "LEE" brand logo. On-screen graphics include a logo with a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK JOY" and "PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his hands. In the initial frames, he is seen mid-sentence with his mouth open and hand raised, while in the later frames, he continues to talk with a slightly different facial expression and hand position. The camera remains static, focusing on the man from the waist up as he engages in the recording.
